历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 4221; in 2023, due to a gap, it plummeted to about 13988; in 2024, it quickly recovered to around 4879; in 2025 (Physics Category), it fell back to about 7060. The rankings have fluctuated sharply over the past four years, with a baseline of about 7060 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics in Ningxia was 21 students from 2022 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 21 students, with the enrollment scale unchanged for five consecutive years, no impact from expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 77th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 72 and 81, overall stable; in 2024, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (campus safety incident), with no significant new negative public opinion in 2025-2026; Douyin popularity ranking is 88th, rated as average, with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, no high-attention signal; Chemistry received an A- in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the chemistry major in the enrollment list, but chemistry belongs to the biology, chemistry, environment, and materials categories, with clear social discouragement.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications remain highly sought after, but the university's physics enrollment in Ningxia includes less popular majors such as Chemistry, Resource Recycling Science and Engineering, and Environmental Engineering; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia Gaokao is about 66,000 (uncertain), estimated at about 42,900 based on the recent physics category proportion of about 65%, a slight decrease from 44,491 in 2025, easing competition slightly; provincial control line data has been included for reference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7060, the enrollment plan unchanged for five consecutive years, a slight decrease in the total number of physics candidates in the province, and the somewhat negative university reputation, it is expected that the lowest admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift back from 7060 to about 7090, with a fluctuation range of 6590-7590.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 7090, range 6590-7590. If ranking is above the upper limit of the range (7590), it is recommended as a reach school; if ranking is within the range (6590-7590), focus on Tier 2 majors with Tier 1 as a reach; if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 6590), prioritize popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Automation. Although Chemistry is an A- discipline, it is a discouraged direction with low application popularity; candidates with rankings near the lower limit can consider it as a safe choice.
